data.body: Gerrit #875 merged with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 (CI 29886053149); origin/main contains a09c08754. Normal rebar init ensure committed migrated tracker .gitignore at 51e5b186e; runtime markers no longer appear in status. Superseded loose PASS/signature pair moved recoverably to .scratch/fa77-b035-orphan-quarantine (SHA256 REVIEW_RESULT 1183241f8c73d97046321588f0c657d4e719da4f019d3670ddc664bb064d86f4; SIGNATURE b6d1d0e3773b4a8419f6af9f04c34322f06dc2fc9b5c98f12345df2b9fb642c1). Tracker status is clean; no event was deleted.
